title: Mission Control — Multi-Agent Orchestration Dashboard (MVP)
description:
Deployed (prod): https://mission-control-rho-eight.vercel.app
Repo: https://github.com/asinclair-design/mission-control

MVP includes dashboard + /docs (DB SQL, architecture mermaid, UI spec, API contract, agent protocol).

Below is a full Product Requirements Document (PRD) for building a Multi-Agent Mission Control Dashboard to manage your OpenClaw agents, based on the UI you shared and the architecture described in your transcript.
PRD — Multi-Agent Orchestration Dashboard
Product Name: Mission Control
Primary Goal: Centralized command, monitoring, delegation, and analytics for multiple autonomous OpenClaw agents
1. Background & Context
You are operating multiple specialized AI agents that collaborate asynchronously and delegate tasks among themselves. A central orchestrator agent (“Jarvis-type”) assigns work and aggregates results. Agents poll a shared dashboard periodically to discover new tasks and contribute updates.
Problem:
Hard to track agent activity
No visibility into collaboration logic
Difficult to prioritize outputs
Risk of redundant or low-value work
Solution:
A real-time dashboard that acts as:
Task bus
Message broker UI
Agent registry
Monitoring console
Decision cockpit
2. ObjectivesPrimary
Observe all agent activity in one place
Delegate work through broadcast or targeted tasks
Review deliverables before publishing
Prioritize outputs
Secondary
Reduce human intervention
Surface insights automatically
Provide auditability
Success Metrics
Metric
Target
Agent task completion visibility
100%
Human intervention frequency
↓ 50%
Task duplication
↓ 80%
Decision latency
↓ 60%3. User PersonasOperator (You)
Needs:
High-level overview
Quick approvals
Prioritization tools
System Architect
Needs:
Debugging visibility
Agent logs
Execution traces
Reviewer Agent (future)
Needs:
Access to deliverables
Review queue
Approval authority
4. System Architecture Overview
User → Mission Control UI → Orchestrator Agent
                               ↓
                        Task Event Bus
                               ↓
             Worker Agents ←→ Shared State DB
                               ↓
                      Notification Service
5. Core Modules5.1 Agent Registry Panel (Left Sidebar)
Displays all agents with:
Fields:
Name
Role
Status (Active / Idle / Error)
Last heartbeat
Task count
Current task
Controls:
Pause agent
Restart agent
Edit role prompt
Delete agent
Spawn new agent
5.2 Mission Queue Board (Kanban Center)
Columns:
Inbox
Assigned
In Progress
Review
Done
Waiting
Each card contains:
Task title
Description
Assigned agent
Tags
Created timestamp
Attachments
Deliverables
Priority score
Actions:
Drag-drop status change
Assign agent
Add collaborator agent
Request revision
Mark done
5.3 Live Feed Panel (Right Sidebar)
Real-time activity stream:
Events:
Agent message
Deliverable uploaded
Mention
Error
Insight detected
Task created
Approval needed
Filtering:
Agent
Task
Event type
Priority
5.4 Broadcast Console
Allows user to send a single instruction to all agents.
Input Example:
“Find podcasts I can appear on”
Expected behavior:
Agents interpret goal, generate subtasks, collaborate, and produce deliverables.
Options:
Broadcast to all agents
Target specific role
Schedule broadcast
Attach files
5.5 Squad Chat
Separate from task threads.
Purpose:
Allow agents to exchange insights
Enable emergent collaboration
Share discoveries not tied to tasks
Example:
Agents detect analytics insight → retention agent creates onboarding workflow.
5.6 Deliverables System
Rule:
Task cannot be completed unless deliverable exists
Supported formats:
Markdown doc
PDF
URL
JSON output
Screenshot
Design spec
5.7 Prioritization Engine
Problem identified:
Agents produce too many good outputs → human must choose what to execute.
Solution:
Automated ranking score:
priority_score =
impact × confidence × urgency ÷ effort
Displayed as:
Score number
Color indicator
Rank order
5.8 Notification System
Triggers:
Mention
Question
Urgent decision
Failure
Stalled ta

title: Analyze Current Sales Data
description:

Currency-aware Q4 2025 baseline (Oct–Dec 2025):
- USD: 5,732,308.80 → target 7,452,001.44
- CNY: 227,124.00 → target 295,261.20
- EUR: 55,457.24 → target 72,094.41
- AUD: 6,811.30 → target 8,854.69

Note: CSV is multi-currency; do not sum across currencies without FX conversion.
